description: AI Agent 领域最新情报

github.title: Hesper-Labs/architect
github.summary: 【GitHub】Open-source spec authoring studio for AI coding agents. Bring your own Claude key, draft a Markdown spec + architecture diagram in the browser, hand off to Claude Code. （⭐ 6）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】人工智能编码代理的开源规范创作工作室。带上自己的Claude密钥，在浏览器中起草Markdown规范+架构图，交给Claude Code。（⭐ 6 ）
github.summary_en: 【GitHub】Open-source spec authoring studio for AI coding agents. Bring your own Claude key, draft a Markdown spec + architecture diagram in the browser, hand off to Claude Code. （⭐ 6）

github.title: freestylefly/wesight
github.summary: 【GitHub】Open-source desktop AI agent workspace with one-click Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent setup and custom LLM model routing. （⭐ 2）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】开源桌面AI Agent工作区，一键Claude Code、Codex、OpenClaw、Hermes Agent设置和自定义LLM模型路由。（⭐ 2 ）
github.summary_en: 【GitHub】Open-source desktop AI agent workspace with one-click Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent setup and custom LLM model routing. （⭐ 2）

github.title: ZeldoGiQ/hyperframes-vibecoding-dach
github.summary: 【GitHub】🎬 Hyperframes Addon für deutschsprachige Anfänger – Videos automatisieren mit Claude Code. Open Source by Vibe Coding DACH. （⭐ 1）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】🎬 Hyperframes Addon für deutschsprachige Anfänger –视频automatisieren mit Claude Code。Vibe Coding DACH开源。（⭐ 1 ）

models.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
models.summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.
models.title_zh: OpenAI在其API中推出新的语音智能功能
models.summary_zh: 这些新功能对于客户服务系统来说可能很方便，但OpenAI表示，他们的应用程序可以跨越其他各个领域，包括教育和创作者平台。
models.title_en: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
models.summary_en: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

models.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
models.summary: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.
models.title_zh: Voi创始人的新人工智能初创公司Pit已成为斯德哥尔摩最新的后起之秀
models.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司Pit由欧洲滑板车巨头Voi的联合创始人领导，并得到a16z的支持，该公司正在领导这家初创公司的1600万美元种子轮融资。
models.title_en: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
models.summary_en: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

models.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
models.summary: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.
models.title_zh: OpenAI为可能的自我伤害案件引入了新的「信任联系人」保障措施
models.summary_zh: 该公司正在加大努力，在谈话可能变成自我伤害的情况下保护ChatGPT用户。
models.title_en: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
models.summary_en: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

models.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
models.summary: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.
models.title_zh: Perplexity的个人电脑现在可供Mac上的所有人使用
models.summary_zh: Perplexity的个人电脑将AI代理引入您的Mac ，现在向所有人开放。
models.title_en: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
models.summary_en: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.
